content: Which of the following gas has high percentage by volume in air?
explanation: The composition of air by volume is around $78 \% \mathrm{N}_2, 21 \% \mathrm{O}_2$ and $1 \%$ other gases including $\mathrm{CO}_2$.

content: Which of the following solvents is safe to use and considered as green solvent?
explanation:
The correct answer is:

Option A: $\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}$

Explanation:

  • Green solvents are those solvents which are environmentally friendly, non-toxic, and safe for human health and nature.

  • Water $(\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O})$ is safe, non-toxic, non-flammable, and environment-friendly. Therefore, it is considered a green solvent.

  • The other options—carbon tetrachloride $(\mathrm{CCl}_4)$, chloroform $(\mathrm{CHCl}_3)$, and dichloromethane $(\mathrm{CH}_2\mathrm{Cl}_2)$—are all halogenated organic solvents which are toxic, harmful to health, and hazardous to the environment.

Thus, the correct answer is

Option A: $\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}$

content: Which from following chemical activities does NOT exhibit good atom economy according to the principles of green chemistry?

options.content: Action of HX on alkene to form alkylhalide.
Action of thionyl chloride on ethanol to form ethyl chloride.
Formation of cyclohexanol from phenol by catalytic hydrogenation.

explanation:
$$ \mathrm{C}_2 \mathrm{H}_5 \mathrm{OH}+\mathrm{SOCl}_2 \longrightarrow \mathrm{C}_2 \mathrm{H}_5 \mathrm{Cl}+\mathrm{SO}_2+\mathrm{HCl} $$

This reaction does not exhibit good atom economy as all the reactants are not incorporated into desired products, and large amount of side products are generated.
